name: 石桥西
description: 「祓赐垭」入口处的石桥西边，是众人汇合的地方。桥下溪水流淌，周围山峦叠嶂，远处可见沼区的迷雾。

visual.prompt: Ancient stone bridge in Chinese mountain ravine, misty swamps in background, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 巴家
description: 「巴家」是世代担任「祓仆」的家族宅邸，有一座「吊脚楼」（主楼），一层有客厅和畜栏，二层是住处。旁边有坟场。

visual.prompt: Chinese traditional wooden stilted house in mountain village, ancient ritual family mansion, oil painting style

name: 祭楼
description: 远离民居的「祭楼」是一座三层吊脚楼。一层有厅、修行房、杂物房，二层有库房和南北卧室，三层是禁区。平时只有祓仆和祀女能进入。

visual.prompt: Ancient Chinese ritual temple tower in deep mountain forest, three-story wooden building, mysterious atmosphere, oil painting style

name: 彭家
description: 「彭家」是乌取为彭须藏准备的吊脚楼。一层有灶台和畜栏，二层有主人房、书房、姐妹房和侧屋。

visual.prompt: Chinese traditional wooden house in mountain village, simple rural dwelling, oil painting style

name: 沼区
description: 位于巴家和祭楼中途西侧的沼泽地带，生人勿进。深处有洞穴，洞中有瘴气弥漫，「先灵」沉睡其中。未经许可的闯入者会成为祭品。

visual.prompt: Dangerous dark swamp in Chinese mountain ravine, poisonous mist, dead trees, ominous atmosphere, oil painting style

name: 乌家/丹矿
description: 「乌家」世代守卫祭祀，拥有农田和出产朱砂的「丹矿」。家中有厨房和里屋。

visual.prompt: Chinese traditional compound with cinnabar mine entrance in mountain, Republican era, oil painting style
